files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+name: Feedback Wanted
+
+on:
+    pull_request:
+        types: [closed]
+
+jobs:
+    feedback:
+        if: github.event.pull_request.merged == true
+        runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+        permissions:
+            pull-requests: write
+            issues: write
+            contents: read
+
+        steps:
+            - name: Comment feedback request
+              uses: peter-evans/create-or-update-comment@23ff15729ef2fc348714a3bb66d2f655ca9066f2
+              with:
+                  issue-number: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
+                  body: |
+                      🎉 Thank you for your contribution! Your PR has been successfully merged.
+                      We would love to hear your thoughts to help improve KubeStellar.
+                      Please take a moment to fill out our short feedback survey:
+                      https://kubestellar.io/survey
